features.path_conditions: Every return path after of_parse_phandle() succeeds must call of_node_put() on the returned device_node before returning, including error paths.
features.fit_test_reasoning: of_parse_phandle returns a device_node with incremented refcount (acquire). of_node_put is a release/cleanup, not data transformation. Missing the release causes a refcount leak on the device_node, which is a resource leak. Follows acquire/use/release semantics.
